# banking corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === SWIFT MT message envelope ===
# expect: SWIFT MT Message Block Header
{1:F01BANKBEBBAXXX0000000000}{2:I103BANKDEFFXXXXN}

# === SWIFT MT transaction reference ===
# expect: SWIFT Transaction Reference (:20: tag)
:20:REF20240115ABC

# === SWIFT MT ordering customer ===
# expect: SWIFT Ordering Customer with IBAN (:50K:)
:50K:/DE89370400440532013000

# === SWIFT MT beneficiary customer ===
# expect: SWIFT Beneficiary Customer with IBAN (:59:)
:59:/GB29NWBK60161331926819

# === SWIFT block-3 UETR carrier ===
# expect: SWIFT Block-3 UETR Tag 121
{121:eb6305c9-1f7f-4def-aa05-3a3f3f8d1234}

# === SWIFT GPI UETR labeled ===
# expect: SWIFT GPI UETR (labeled)
UETR: eb6305c9-1f7f-4def-aa05-3a3f3f8d1234

# === ISO 20022 message identifier ===
# expect: ISO 20022 Message Identifier
Schema pacs.008.001.10 in use here.

# === Legal Entity Identifier labeled ===
# expect: Legal Entity Identifier (labeled)
LEI: 529900T8BM49AURSDO55

# === Fedwire input message accountability data ===
# expect: Fedwire IMAD (labeled)
IMAD: 20240115F1QC07000001

# === Fedwire output message accountability data ===
# expect: Fedwire OMAD (labeled)
OMAD: 20240115L1B707000002

# === CHIPS universal identifier ===
# expect: CHIPS UID (labeled)
CHIPS UID: 000002

# === Russia correspondent account ===
# expect: Russia Correspondent Account
30101810400000000225

# === India IFSC ===
# expect: India IFSC Code
HDFC0000123

# === India UPI virtual payment address ===
# expect: India UPI VPA
merchant.store-01@paytm

# === Brazil PIX key labeled ===
# expect: Brazil PIX Key (labeled)
pix: 123.456.789-09

# === Card track 1 magstripe ===
# expect: Card Track 1 Magstripe
%B4012888888881881^DOE/JOHN^2512101000000000000000?

# === Card track 2 magstripe ===
# expect: Card Track 2 Magstripe
;4012888888881881=25121010000012345678?

# === Card PAN with CVV labeled ===
# expect: Card PAN with CVV (labeled)
4012888888881881 CVV: 123

# === FATCA global intermediary identification number ===
# expect: FATCA GIIN
98Q96B.00000.LE.250

# === Open Banking request id labeled ===
# expect: Open Banking X-Request-ID (labeled)
X-Request-ID: 99391c7e-ad88-49ec-a2ad-99ddcb1f7721

# === Bank account formats (Block 5) ===
# expect: New Zealand Bank Account Number
# expect: Mexico CLABE (labeled)
# expect: Canada Bank Transit (labeled)
# expect: Australia BSB (labeled)
12-3456-7890123-00
CLABE: 002010077777777771
transit number: 12345
BSB: 062-000
